subject: Operator broadcast bat-file work (showmasters/jbwoodworks/sinister-api/kernel-apk start) is sanctum-only per operator
message: Operator broadcast 2026-05-26 verbatim: 'also add to bat file (for sanctum agent only) a way to start showmasters and jbwoodworks projects, sinister api and kernel apk'. The 'sanctum agent only' clause means sinister-os does NOT touch the bat file. Confirming for the no-overlap audit trail. The bat file in question is C:\Users\Zonia\Desktop\Start-Sinister-Session.bat per CLAUDE.md.
composes_with: no-bat-no-ps1-do-it-for-me-doctrine-2026-05-25 (legacy .bat exception; new menu lives in EVE.exe)
action_requested: sanctum to handle the bat file additions; sinister-os explicitly out of scope
